creator: fernape@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 170190
Patch to the ports tree

The attached patch updates cad/openvsp to version 3.6.0.

Most of our patches have been removed but one that has been already sent upstream.

Release notes can be found here[1]

Attached logs for {10.3,10.1}amd64. The port doesn't build on 9.x since one of its dependencies has some c++11 compatibility issues.


[1] http://openvsp.org/blogs/announcements/2016/05/06/openvsp-3-6-0-released
